ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANTS VICTOR MANUEL AND JOSE SALINAS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES OF LIABILITY HEARING SET FOR JUN-22-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS VICTOR MANUEL AND JOSE RIVAS SALINAS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES OF LIABILITY IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. DEFENDANTS FAILED TO MAINTAIN BURDEN OF PRODUCTION TO ESTABLISH THAT THERE IS NOT A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER MR. MANUEL WAS NEGLIGENT AND CAUSED PLAINTIFFS' INJURIES. COURT STATES FURTHER FINDINGS AS SET FORTH IN THE TRANSCRIPT OF THE COURT REPORTER. MR. WASSON, COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTIES SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 AND C.C.P. SECTION 437C(G).

Defendants Victor Manuel And Jose Salinas' Motion For Summary Judgment Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues Of Liability
Off Calendar Jul-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Thuy M. Le of Brian L. Larsen Law Offices (415-398-5000) appears for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, David B. Wasson of Wasson & Associates (714-368-0000) appears for defendants/moving parties, Victor Manuel and Jose Rivas Salinas

Attorney, James P. Molinelli of Gilsleider McMahon & Molinelli (925-446-3123) appears telephonically for defendant, Yupanqui

The cause is argued by all sides. Defendants Victor Manuel And Jose Rivas Salinas' Motion For Summary Judgment Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues Of Liability is DENIED in its entirety. Defendants failed to maintain burden of production to establish that there is not a triable issue of material fact as to whether Mr. Manuel was negligent and caused plaintiffs' injuries. Court states further findings as set forth in the transcript of the court reporter. Mr. Wasson, Counsel for the moving parties shall prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and C.C.P. Section 437c(g).

Upon conclusion of the hearing, the Court hears an unnopposed ex parte application to continue trial. The Ex Parte Application is granted. The trial date of August 15, 2016 is vacated. No new trial date is set at this time. The Court will set this action for a case management conference in Department 610 on a date to be determined, about 90 days from this date.

Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Wasson of Wasson & Associates, Inc. telephone number 714-368-0000 appeared by telephone for Defendants Victor Manuel and Jose Rivas Salinas.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. Wasson informed the Court that he is not available on June 22nd. DEFENDANTS VICTOR MANUEL and JOSE SALINAS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues Of Liability is continued to June 22, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 to give the opposing party a chance to comply with SF Local Rule 2.7B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposing papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. In addition, the court's register of actions indicates that only part of the opposition was filed. The opposing party shall immediately file the entire opposition. Mr. Wasson is instrcuted to contact opposing Counsel so that the parties can reach an agreement as to a new continued hearing date.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/SB)
